creator: chinsan@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is a set of perl modules for encapsulating interactions with the
Microsoft Network "Messenger" chat system. You might use it to develop
clients, or robots. The components are, this module, Net::Msmgr, which
contains some non-object helper routines (mostly the authentication chain
for using MSNP8 (Protocol version 8) and a handful of manifest constants for
debugging.

WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-Msmgr/

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
